texto: Rose, the moon is incredible. Everything down on Earth relies on it. Rats jump for it. Tides rush out from it. Humans kiss under it. Without it there'd be nothing down there worth the light. And that just happened by chance -trillions of odd against it- one bit of stardust meets another bit of dust.
explicacao: Citação de Gareth Roberts sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Rose, the moon is incredible. Everything down on Earth relies on it. Rats jump for it. Tides rush…” articula reflexao, moon, there em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
